sections.title: Design Tasks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Task AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: UX Review
powers.prompt: Perform a UX review for {key} "{summary}". Check accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), usability patterns, and consistency.

powers.label: Extract Specs
powers.prompt: Extract design specifications for {key} "{summary}". Include spacing, colors, typography, and component states.

powers.label: Handoff Doc
powers.prompt: Generate a design-to-dev handoff document for {key} "{summary}". Include component specs, interactions, and edge cases.
